headline: Energy Transition Today - Climate Tech Boom Powered By Policy Innovation And Investment
summary: The climate technology sector is poised for significant growth, with the global market projected to expand from USD 48.46 billion in 2025 to USD 312.74 billion by 2035, driven by advancements in clean energy and carbon removal technologies. Key policy...
